2026-06-02TCCanada Marine ActAppointment of the director of the Saint John Port AuthorityAppointment of Charlene Hayes of Saint John, New Brunswick, to be a director of the Saint John Port Authority, to hold office for a term of three years.N/A
subject: Appointment of the director of the Saint John Port Authority
